title: Spin to Position

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText2: attach printed images of body parts to the spinner e.g. right hand, head, left foot

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The goal is to find other body parts that can be used to activate a switch.
2.  When the switch user presses their switch, the spinner will spin.
3.  Wherever it lands is the body part they must use next to press the switch, e.g. if it lands on "left hand", move the switch so they can use their left hand.
NB: If you do not have a spinner, use an online one. Many free, customisable options work with a switch and switch interface.

tooltipText: Use a switch accessible spinner to identify body parts to activate a switch, so you can begin exploring Gear 3 activities
